title: Slot Cars
description: Build and race on slot car tracks with your friends!
body: Adds working slot cars into the game. Simply place down a few tracks, grab a slot car controller, and use the controller on a track to spawn a car! Once a car is placed, using the controller will accelerate the car down the track. Be careful going around corners though; if you go too fast your car may fly off! The controllers can be dyed any color, and the car it spawns will match. If you have Entity Culling installed, the cars will need to be added to the Skip Tick Culling list to work properly.
